view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for weather-dependent cancellation policy is not satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for weather-dependent cancellation policy is not satisfied.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for weather-dependent cancellation policy is not satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of being weather-dependent with a cancellation policy. However, the evidence indicates that while there is a mention of a cancellation policy in the linked use case, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the operational status of this policy in the current context. Specifically, the evidence does not demonstrate how the cancellation policy is applied in practice, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
